hypothesis: For a molecular 3D MLIP trained on QM9, incorporating a cross-modal alignment regularizer that maximizes intrinsic-dimension correlation (IDCor) with a pretrained SMILES language model’s embeddings for paired molecules will reduce zero-shot total-energy MAE on OMol25 by at least 10% relative to the same-architecture baseline and prevent OOD alignment inflation by keeping the model’s intrinsic dimension on OMol25 within 10% of its QM9 value.
